controls.label: Does your business have a Gaming Machines process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Gaming Machines process in place. You must establish a documented Gaming Machines process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: Gaming Machine Payout Thresholds
groups.description: Gaming machines (excluding casinos) benefit from threshold-based exemptions from routine customer identification for low-value transactions and deposits. These exemptions apply unless your enhanced due diligence program identifies elevated ML/TF risk.

groups.title: Enhanced Due Diligence Override
groups.description: All gaming machine exemptions are conditional. Your enhanced customer due diligence program must include the capability to override these exemptions and require customer identification when ML/TF risk warrants it.
